'''dajuzu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:road|road]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-j-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:road|road]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dajuzu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæjizith|dæjizith]] || [[word:dæjizij|dæjizij]] || [[word:dæjizish|dæjizish]] || [[word:dæjizi|dæjizi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dajujuzuth|dajujuzuth]] || [[word:dajujuzuj|dajujuzuj]] || [[word:dajujuzush|dajujuzush]] || [[word:dajujuzu|dajujuzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dajuzuth|dajuzuth]] || [[word:dajuzuj|dajuzuj]] || [[word:dajuzush|dajuzush]] || [[word:dajuzu|dajuzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dajufzufth|dajufzufth]] || [[word:dajufzufj|dajufzufj]] || [[word:dajufzufsh|dajufzufsh]] || [[word:dajufzuf|dajufzuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dajuzuthu|dajuzuthu]] || [[word:dajuzuju|dajuzuju]] || [[word:dajuzushu|dajuzushu]] || [[word:dajuzuku|dajuzuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dajuzuth|dajuzuth]] || [[word:dajuzuj|dajuzuj]] || [[word:dajuzush|dajuzush]] || [[word:dajuzu|dajuzu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dajuzuthul|dajuzuthul]] || [[word:dajuzujul|dajuzujul]] || [[word:dajuzushul|dajuzushul]] || [[word:dajuzukul|dajuzukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dajuzuuthuthu|dajuzuuthuthu]] || [[word:dajuzuujuju|dajuzuujuju]] || [[word:dajuzuushushu|dajuzuushushu]] || [[word:dajuzuuku|dajuzuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dajuzuthun|dajuzuthun]] || [[word:dajuzujun|dajuzujun]] || [[word:dajuzushun|dajuzushun]] || [[word:dajuzukun|dajuzukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dajuzuthuoro|dajuzuthuoro]] || [[word:dajuzujuoro|dajuzujuoro]] || [[word:dajuzushuoro|dajuzushuoro]] || [[word:dajuzukuoro|dajuzukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]

{{wordpage|1e8b6ef}}
